name: Eradicate
description: Eliminate a set number of enemy forces. High enemy density, sustained combat.
notes: Prioritize high fire rate and area denial. Crowd control is essential.

name: Blitz
description: Complete multiple objectives rapidly across the map. Speed is critical.
notes: Prioritize mobility and self-sufficiency. Light armor recommended.

name: Defend
description: Hold a position against waves of enemies. Fortification and sentries excel.
notes: Sentries and emplacements are highly effective. Fortified armor helps.

name: Sabotage
description: Destroy or disable enemy installations. Demolition power is key.
notes: Bring heavy anti-armor. Eagle 500KG and Orbital Railcannon excel here.

name: Retrieve Essential Personnel
description: Escort civilians or retrieve assets while under attack. Survivability matters.
notes: Stun stratagems keep enemies off civilians. Shield generator pack recommended.

name: Eliminate Target
description: Kill a priority high-value target. Anti-tank and precision tools win.
notes: Bring the heaviest anti-armor tools available. Railgun, Spear, and Orbital Railcannon.

name: Spread Democracy
description: Plant the flag at multiple locations while fending off enemy resistance.
notes: Balanced loadout. Prioritize mobility. Jump pack can help reach objectives.

name: Destroy Bug Holes
description: Locate and destroy Terminid bug holes across the map. Grenades and explosives seal them.
notes: Grenades can close bug holes. Bring explosives and mobility to cover ground.

name: Purge Hatcheries
description: Burn out Terminid hatcheries to stop egg production. Fire weapons excel.
notes: Flamethrowers and incendiaries are ideal. Clear eggs with fire damage.

name: Eliminate Brood Commanders
description: Hunt down and eliminate Terminid Brood Commanders directing the swarm.
notes: Medium-penetration weapons for commanders. Expect heavy escorts.

name: Activate Terminid Control System
description: Activate facilities across the map. Objective-focused with moderate combat.
notes: Versatility and mobility help you complete objectives quickly.

name: Activate E-710 Pumps
description: Activate and defend E-710 extraction pumps across the map.
notes: Need to activate then defend each pump briefly. Mix of mobility and defense.

name: Destroy Command Bunkers
description: Assault and demolish Automaton command bunkers. Expect heavy fortification.
notes: Heavy ordnance needed for bunker destruction. Expect armored resistance.

name: Sabotage Air Base
description: Infiltrate and destroy Automaton gunship production facilities.
notes: Light armor for speed. Destroy fabricators and fuel stores before reinforcements arrive.

name: Destroy Supply Lines
description: Interdict Automaton supply convoys and destroy logistics infrastructure.
notes: Anti-tank weapons for vehicles. Mobility to hit multiple convoy points.

name: Raise the Flag
description: Capture strategic points in Automaton territory by raising Super Earth flags.
notes: Sprint between capture points. Balanced loadout for varied resistance.

name: Destroy Warp Gates
description: Locate and destroy Illuminate warp gates that allow reinforcement portals.
notes: Arc/energy weapons effective. Heavy ordnance for gate destruction.

name: Recover Artifacts
description: Retrieve Illuminate technology artifacts before they can be teleported away.
notes: Speed is critical — artifacts despawn. Bring defensive tools for extraction.

name: SEAF Artillery
description: Defend SEAF artillery installations while they fire on enemy positions.
notes: Stationary defense. Sentries and emplacements shine. Heavy armor recommended.

name: Launch ICBM
description: Arm and launch an ICBM by completing activation sequences under heavy assault.
notes: Extended defense objective. Bring heavy firepower and survivability gear.

name: Commando Raid
description: Covert strike mission behind enemy lines. Speed and stealth over firepower.
notes: Light armor mandatory. Avoid prolonged engagements. Hit objectives and extract.
